creator: nmingotti@gmail.com
text:
I am running FreeBSD-11.1, and latest Chromium package 
chromium-64.0.3282.186_1

I am running with chromium with:
/usr/local/bin/chrome --disable-gpu

Respect to the previous package release this chromium hangs
very often. But, there is a page in which the hangs ratio
has remained very high, that is web.whatsapp.com.

It hangs often in both these cases:

1] When I open the page.

2] When the page was already open and running, then I move 
to other tabs or chromium windows, when I come back to whatsapp
tab it is stuck. I must kill it and try to reload. 

Bye
Nicola
